title: Greenleaf Hotel Gensan
location: San Miguel St. corner J. Catolico St., General Santos City
description: Greenleaf feels like the kind of GenSan stay you recommend when someone wants comfort without being far from the city rhythm. It sits in a practical central area, close to malls, banks, restaurants, and everyday stops, so guests can land, settle in, and move around without over-planning every ride.

highlights.title: City comfort
highlights.text: A polished stay close to GenSan's malls and business stops.

highlights.title: Dining choices
highlights.text: Mint Cafe, Tea Leaf Restaurant, Lobby Lounge, Zanzibar, and in-room dining are listed by the hotel.

highlights.title: Wellness
highlights.text: Pool, Lavandin Spa, and fitness/wellness facilities are part of the hotel offer.

highlights.title: Events ready
highlights.text: Ballrooms and multi-function rooms make it useful for meetings and celebrations.

details: This guide includes Greenleaf as a central GenSan hotel option for visitors who want a comfortable base near malls, restaurants, banks, and transport access.

For a first-time guest, the advantage is simple. You can stay somewhere comfortable, then plan meals, meetings, errands, or short city stops without making the hotel feel isolated from the rest of the trip.
It is a practical fit for business travelers, couples, families who want convenience, and visitors who prefer an established hotel base while exploring General Santos City.

gettingThere.title: How to get there

routes.title: From Bulaong Bus Terminal
paragraphs: If you are coming from Bulaong Bus Terminal in General Santos City, you can ride a local tricycle with a yellow plate. Tell the driver to take you to Greenleaf Hotel.

For a direct pakyaw trip, the fare is usually around PHP 50 to PHP 100 depending on your agreement with the driver. For a regular or shared ride, the fare is usually around PHP 20. Please confirm the fare before starting the trip.

routes.title: From General Santos Airport
paragraphs: If you are coming from General Santos Airport, the most convenient option is to take a taxi or book a ride in advance.
You may contact Gensan City Taxi through its Facebook page, or call or text the numbers below before traveling.
routes.suggestedMessage: Hello, I need a taxi going to Greenleaf Hotel. May I know if a unit is available and the estimated fare?

gettingThere.note: Fares, availability, and contact details may change, so please confirm directly with the driver or taxi operator before traveling.
